calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MOBILE AUTO CONCEPTS, INC'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. Appearances: Harold B. Auerbach of Glassberg Pollak & Associates (291.8320) for plaintiff Granite State Insurance Company; Wally Ghnaim (531.2703) for defendant Mobile Auto Concepts, Inc. Argued and the court ruled as follows: denied. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-09-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

APPEARANCES: Wally Ghnaim, 531-2703 deft in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: Mr. Ghnaim did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing. The Court continued the matter to 03/01/11 at 9:00am. Defendant to give notice. Order signed re continuance. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
